rationale: Both hit similar recall on the loosely-related ground-truth theme (dsocek's 'derive from existing per-model mapping instead of hardcoding'), neither nailing the specific PEFT-naming-conflict angle. X's central correctness claim ('StableDiffusionXLPipeline is the only pipeline exposing top-level self.unet') appears to be contradicted by Y's grep evidence showing OvisImagePipeline and Flux2KleinPipeline also have top-level self.unet attributes, undercutting X's precision. Y's findings are consistently backed by explicit grep/read evidence with file:line citations, making them more verifiable and actionable, including a concrete registry.py/manager.py duplication point and a missing round-trip-test gap analogous to the existing bagel test.
